dungeon: (LONG SINGLE-SESSION STREAM) ROTF — fuller Marble Colossus taunts (catacombs guardian) + Arcanica + Fuel
source: video disc_VFAOCb9EQJ4 (3139 frames, 0 transitions, 4709 chat; webcam overlay + 'PRIMAL = 0 LEGENDARY' watermark; client X3.6). Diverse biomes. Chat captured fuller Marble Colossus taunts + Arcanica + the Fuel/event systems.
map: DOCUMENTED biomes: brown brick, grey STONE MAZE / CATACOMBS (Marble Colossus's domain), blue ice cavern, chicken-coop checkered, grey vault, dark space, green/colorful grid, magenta dungeon, tan sandstone.

bosses.name: Marble Colossus
taunts: PAH! The prohibited arts allow untold [power]...
It is my duty to protect these catacombs... my purpose!
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED VERBATIM — FULLER than disc_rly0ngKekNs (which only got 'I fell myself... Slip...'). Marble Colossus is a CATACOMBS-GUARDIAN boss: dutiful protector of catacombs ('It is my duty to protect these catacombs... my purpose!') who disdains intruders' 'prohibited arts'. Grey-stone catacombs arena.

bosses.name: Arcanica
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED VERBATIM — new line, re-confirms the mana-vampire Arcanica (cf. 'Arcanica wants mana' etc.).

mechanics: DOCUMENTED: (1) MARBLE COLOSSUS = a CATACOMBS-GUARDIAN boss (fuller taunts: guards catacombs as its 'duty/purpose', scorns 'prohibited arts'). (2) Arcanica 'sensing mana' (re-confirm). (3) D3 FUEL extraction in LARGE amounts — 'extracted [142]/[30]/[379] Fuel from this mysterious object!' (mass extraction; re-confirms Fuel-from-mysterious-objects). (4) 'PRIMAL = 0 LEGENDARY' creator overlay (Primal tier >> Legendary). Client X3.6.
uncertain: Marble Colossus 1st line tail truncated ('untold [power/might]'). No NEW bosses (Marble Colossus + Arcanica are enrichments). Most of the 4709 chat is social; sampled key lines.
confidence: HIGH for the fuller Marble Colossus taunts (catacombs-guardian role) + Arcanica line + Fuel re-confirm + Primal>Legendary. LOW novelty otherwise (long social stream).
